bird.name: São Tomé olive pigeon
bird.summary: The São Tomé olive pigeon or maroon pigeon (Columba thomensis) is an endangered species of pigeon which is endemic to the island of São Tom…

locations.name: Bombaim
locations.summary: Bombaim is a small village on São Tomé Island in São Tomé and Príncipe.

locations.name: Xufexufe
locations.summary: Rio Xufexufe is a river in the island of São Tomé, São Tomé and Príncipe.

locations.name: Água Izé
locations.summary: Água Izé is a village on São Tomé Island.

locations.name: São João dos Angolares
locations.summary: São João dos Angolares is a small town on the east coast of São Tomé Island in São Tomé and Príncipe.

relations.subject: São Tomé olive pigeon
relations.evidence: The olive pigeon occurs in several parts of the island of São Tomé, including the northwest (Chamiço), the central massif (Lagoa Amelia, Zampalma, Nova Ceilão, Bombaim and the valley of Rio Io Grande near Formoso Pequeno), the southwest (valleys of the rivers Xufexufe and Ana Chaves) and in the southeast (west of Água Izé, on Pico Maria Fernandes and north of São João dos Angolares)
